content: Please, make sure that all the changes are successfully saved during this day.

comment.text: This translation key is used to display a notice to users when they access a screen indicating planned maintenance on a bar. The message is displayed when the user clicks on a button or opens a dialog with this ID ("main-bar"), and informs them that any changes made during this period should be saved successfully.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The Korean translation '이 때' (at this time) refers to the maintenance period, whereas the English text 'during this day' refers to a specific day. More importantly, the English text is a directive/instruction to the user to ensure their changes are saved, while the Korean translation is phrased as a general request/observation that doesn't clearly emphasize the user's responsibility to save their work before the maintenance period.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: 오늘 중으로 모든 변경 사항이 성공적으로 저장되었는지 확인해 주시기 바랍니다.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The Portuguese translation changes the meaning from 'during this day' (referring to the maintenance period) to 'on the indicated day' (referring to a specific date), which may confuse users if the maintenance spans multiple days or if the context implies the current day.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Por favor, certifique-se de que todas as alterações foram guardadas com sucesso durante este dia.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The word 'success' is written in English ('success') instead of the Romanian equivalent ('succes').
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Vă rugăm să vă asigurați că toate modificările sunt salvate cu succes pe parcursul acestei zile.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The phrase 'za ta dan' (for this day) implies a deadline or a duration, whereas the English 'during this day' refers to the period of time when changes are being made. In the context of maintenance, the Slovenian version sounds like 'save them by the end of the day', which is a different meaning.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Prosimo, poskrbite, da bodo vse spremembe čez celotno obdobje uspešno shranjene.
